briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform RSA encryption on the provided data by using specified public key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_RsaParams structure which holds the parameters of RSA input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Validate InputDataAddr and that exactly one of KeyCompAddr or KeyId is provided.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform RSA decryption on the provided data by using specified private key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_RsaParams structure which holds the parameters of RSA input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validations of inputs.
Validate InputDataAddr and that exactly one of KeyCompAddr or KeyId is provided.
Generate a unique ID and register the callback function.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform RSA decryption using CRT algorithm for the provided message by using specified private key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_RsaParams structure which holds the parameters of RSA input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Validate InputDataAddr and that exactly one of KeyCompAddr or KeyId is provided.
Generate unique ID and register the callback.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends command to ASUFW to perform encoding using RSA OAEP padding algorithm by using the specified RSA key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_RsaOaepPaddingParams structure which holds the parameters of RSA input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Validations of inputs.
Generate Unique ID and register the callback.
Set the command ID based on the selected SHA type.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform decoding using RSA OAEP padding algorithm of the provided message by using the specified key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_RsaOaepPaddingParams structure which holds the parameters of RSA input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Validations of inputs.
Generate unique ID and register the callback.
Set the command ID based on the selected SHA type.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to generate signature using RSA PSS padding on provided message by using the specified key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_RsaPaddingParams structure which holds the parameters of RSA input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Validations of inputs.
Generate unique ID and register the callback.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends request to ASUFW to verify the specified signature by using RSA PSS padding by using the provided key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.
Pointer to XAsu_RsaPaddingParams structure which holds the parameters of RSA input arguments.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Validations of inputs.
Generate unique ID and register the callback.
Select the command ID based on SHA type.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform RSA OAEP encrypt and decrypt Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Generate unique ID and register callback.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a command to ASUFW to perform RSA PSS sign generation and verification Known Answer Tests (KAT's).

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XAsu_ClientParams structure which holds the client input parameters.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS, if IPI request to ASU is sent successfully.
XASU_INVALID_ARGUMENT, if any argument is invalid.
XASU_QUEUE_FULL, if Queue buffer is full.
XST_FAILURE, if sending an IPI request to ASU fails.

inbodydescription.para: Validate input parameters.
Generate unique ID and register callback.
Create command header.
Update request buffer and send an IPI request to ASU.

briefdescription.para: This file contains the implementation of the client interface functions for RSA driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 ss 08/20/24 Initial release ss 09/26/24 Fixed doxygen comments ss 02/04/25 Added client API's for RSA padding scheme yog 01/28/26 Added RSA key ID validation in RSA operations.
